title: Results from moving lab of the Sea4Value proyect: extraction of Ga, In, and Rb using ILSE technology
author: Eurecat
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Excel document contains the results obtained from a Moving Lab experiment focused on the extraction of Gallium (Ga), Indium (In), and Rubidium (Rb) using Ionic Liquid Solvent Extraction (ILSE) technology. This document also includes a schematic summary of the methodology carried out during the experimentation.
steps_raw: This Excel document contains the results obtained from a Moving Lab experiment focused on the extraction of Gallium (Ga), Indium (In), and Rubidium (Rb) using Ionic Liquid Solvent Extraction (ILSE) technology. This document also includes a schematic summary of the methodology carried out during the experimentation.
